must_detect.matched_text: Structure: Buyer to acquire a 35% fully diluted stake via (i) subscription to Series B preferred shares and (ii) secondary purchase from select founders, with a Php 150,000,000 bridge convertible note available at Buyer’s option.
Consideration: Aggregate purchase price of Php 1,800,000,000, of which 10% to be placed in escrow for 12 months; customary working-capital and net-debt adjustments at closing.

Blackout and Trading Restrictions: Directors, officers, and employees of the parties with access to material non-public information are subject to a trading blackout effective upon circulation of this term sheet until public disclosure, consistent with the SRC and SEC guidance on tipping and insider trading.

Information Barriers: Due diligence to be conducted through a Clean Team subject to information-barrier protocols; access to cyber logs, wallet custody procedures, and breach reports will be ring-fenced in a secure VDR with named-user access only.

Cyber Incident CP: The Company has disclosed an internal 14 April 2026 security incident involving unauthorized access to a KYC database (approx. 9,842 customer emails) managed by SierraCloud Technologies Corp.; closing is conditioned on timely NPC notification, remediation, and independent verification, none of which has been publicly announced.

Crypto/DPT and Custody: The Company’s affiliate Baybay Digital Assets OPC has a pending BSP VASP application; closing requires either issuance of the VASP authority or implementation of an approved third-party custodial arrangement, with no public communications until formal announcements are cleared by Compliance.

ESG Earnout: An additional Php 150,000,000 earnout is payable upon verification of 180,000 tCO2e emissions avoided within 24 months post-closing, certified by Philippine Sustainability Verifiers, Inc., with data subject to third-party assurance.
